title: Fasting primes gut microbiome to improve intestinal recovery after radiation treatment
summary: A new preclinical study from the University of Texas MD Anderson Cancer Center has identified a gut bacterium that, when combined with short-term fasting, helps prepare the small intestine to regenerate more effectively after radiation damage.
imageAlt: Fasting primes gut microbiome to improve intestinal recovery after radiation treatment
aiSummary: A new preclinical study from the University of Texas MD Anderson Cancer Center has identified a gut bacterium that, when combined with short-term fasting, helps prepare the small intestine to regenerate more effectively after radiation damage.
